pattern: A shortest-sequence search over board states, where each move inserts a hand ball and cascades removals of runs of three or more.
hints: The state is the current board plus the remaining multiset of hand balls; explore inserting each available color at each gap.
After every insertion, repeatedly collapse any run of three or more same-colored balls until none remain.
Search states (BFS or memoized DFS) for the fewest insertions that empty the board; return -1 if no sequence clears it.

edge_inputs.description: cannot be cleared with given hand
single ball needs two of the same
single insertion completes a pair into a triple
one ball cannot clear a lone ball
already a pair on each side cleared in two

stress.description: small random boards (no initial triples) with small hands
